jsonLd.title: Mid-Level SEO Specialist at Voylla
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!
